prompt: Create a high-fashion emotional portrait poster with a cinematic editorial photo aesthetic. The image shows a young East Asian woman sitting inside the back seat of a car, framed from mid-thigh upward in a vertical 4:5 composition. She has long messy black wavy hair, pale natural skin, soft tired eyes, slightly parted lips, and a quiet melancholic expression. She wears a white sleeveless dress with a loose black necktie. Pose her leaning against the car seat with one hand pressed softly to her cheek, one arm extended toward the camera, and one bent bare leg visible in the foreground. The car interior is dark with a black seat and curved roof frame; outside the side window are sunlit trees, blue sky, and dappled daylight. Use harsh natural sunlight and shadow bands across her face, arms, and dress, with realistic lens contrast, muted cool tones, subtle grain, and a slightly chaotic late-night inspiration mood. Add graphic poster typography and glitch-like micro text overlays: large distressed white title text at lower left reading STATIC SOUL; small red-accent line above it reading ALIVE IN NOISE.; tiny text blocks reading “QUIET FIRE.” at upper left, “SILENT BUT BURNING” below it, “STATIC SOUL” near the right window, “I WAS NEVER MEANT TO BE SILENT” beneath it, “EYES OPEN // SEE EVERYTHING FEEL NOTHING KEEP BREATHING” near the bottom center, and “ALIVE IN NOISE // NOT LOST. JUST UNDOING. IN REAL TIME.” at the bottom right. Include one thin handwritten white signature scribble crossing the main title, faint scanline fragments, small red slashes, and subtle digital noise artifacts. Keep the overall look like a premium fashion magazine poster: photorealistic, intimate, moody, textured, with no extra people, no watermark, and no unreadable large text beyond the designed micro typography.
